mapper.select: /* DB 목록 조회 common.selectDbList */ SELECT A.COMP_ID AS PARAM_COMP_ID, A.DB_ID AS DB_ID, B.COMP_NM FROM COM_COMP_DBINFO A LEFT JOIN COM_COMPINFO B ON A.COMP_ID = B.COMP_ID WHERE B.USE_YN != 'N' ORDER BY B.COMP_NM
/* DB ID 조회 common.selectDbId */ SELECT DB_ID FROM COM_COMP_DBINFO WHERE COMP_ID = #{compId}
/* 관리자 접근 IP 목록 조회 common.selectAdminPageAccessIpList */ SELECT ALLOW_IP FROM ${masterDbId}.COM_ACCESS_ACL WHERE USER_ID = 'ADMIN_PAGE'
